hero.title: Deploy AI Teams That Think, Learn & Act
hero.lead: ServiceTsunami is the enterprise platform for building multi-agent AI systems. Orchestrate specialized agent teams, connect to your tools via integrations, and let your AI remember everything across conversations.
hero.subtext: Stop building one-off chatbots. Deploy agent teams that coordinate, remember context, and execute real workflows across your business.
hero.subHighlight: The agentic AI platform that scales with your ambition.

governedDataProducts.title: Multi-Agent Team Orchestration
governedDataProducts.description: Hierarchical agent teams with supervisors, specialists, and leaf agents. Each team handles a domain — personal assistant, dev ops, data science, sales — coordinated by a root supervisor.

unifiedLakehouseFabric.title: Persistent Memory & Knowledge Graph
unifiedLakehouseFabric.description: Your agents remember. Entity extraction, relation mapping, and contextual recall across every conversation. Luna learns your contacts, preferences, and business context automatically.

agenticAutomation.title: Workflow Automation Engine
agenticAutomation.description: Temporal-powered durable workflows for deal pipelines, data sync, knowledge extraction, and scheduled automations. Reliable execution with full audit trails.

items.label: Agent Teams
items.description: Personal assistant, dev team, data team, sales, marketing, deal management, and industry-specific agents — each with their own tools and expertise.

items.label: Integrations
items.description: OAuth-connected integrations with automatic token refresh. Your agents read emails, manage calendar events, and communicate via WhatsApp natively.

items.label: Knowledge System
items.description: Automatic extraction from every conversation. Entities are categorized, related, and scored. Agent memories capture preferences and decisions for contextual recall.

features.heading: Everything Your AI Agents Need
features.subtitle: From orchestration to memory — one platform for building production-grade AI agent systems.

connectEverySource.title: Multi-Agent Orchestration
connectEverySource.description: Design hierarchical agent teams with a root supervisor routing to specialized sub-teams. Each agent has tools, instructions, and domain expertise. Powered by Google ADK.

semanticControlPlane.title: Knowledge Graph & Memory
semanticControlPlane.description: Automatic entity extraction from conversations. Entities, relations, and agent memories form a persistent knowledge graph. Recall injection gives agents context on every interaction.

agentAutomationStudio.title: Workflow Automation
agentAutomationStudio.description: Temporal-powered durable workflows for complex multi-step processes. Deal pipelines, data sync, knowledge extraction, follow-ups, and scheduled tasks — all with retry logic and audit trails.

lakehouse.heading: Why Agent Teams Beat Single Chatbots
lakehouse.description: Single-agent systems hit a wall. Multi-agent orchestration breaks through.

unifiedGovernance.title: The Complexity Problem
unifiedGovernance.description: Real business tasks span multiple domains — research, analysis, communication, execution. A single agent can't do it all well. Specialized agent teams divide and conquer.

programmablePipelines.title: The Memory Problem
programmablePipelines.description: Chatbots forget everything between sessions. ServiceTsunami's knowledge graph persists entities, relations, and preferences across every conversation and channel.

compliantCollaboration.title: The Integration Problem
compliantCollaboration.description: Agents are useless without access to your tools. OAuth integrations with Gmail, Calendar, WhatsApp, and more give your agents real-world capabilities.

secondary.heading: Platform Capabilities
secondary.description: What you get out of the box.

adaptiveGuardrails.title: Luna — Your AI Co-Pilot
adaptiveGuardrails.description: A personal assistant that learns from every interaction. Luna extracts contacts, remembers preferences, schedules follow-ups, and gets smarter over time.

explainableDecisions.title: Self-Evolving Agents
explainableDecisions.description: The dev team agents can modify their own codebase, create new tools, run tests, and deploy changes. Your AI system improves itself autonomously.

lakehouseSignals.title: Enterprise-Grade Security
lakehouseSignals.description: Multi-tenant isolation, Fernet-encrypted credential vault, JWT authentication, and full audit trails. Deploy on your own GKE cluster with Helm charts.

dataIntegrationLayer.title: Integration Layer
dataIntegrationLayer.description: OAuth providers (Google, GitHub, Slack), WhatsApp Business API, MCP server for Databricks, and credential vault for secure token management.

semanticGovernanceLayer.title: Orchestration Layer
semanticGovernanceLayer.description: Google ADK multi-agent supervisor pattern, Temporal durable workflows, task dispatch, and entity validation. Reliable execution at scale.

agenticExecutionLayer.title: Intelligence Layer
agenticExecutionLayer.description: Knowledge graph with entity extraction, relation mapping, and contextual recall. Multi-LLM router supporting Claude, GPT, DeepSeek, and more.

ai.heading: Agent Teams for Every Domain
ai.description: Deploy specialized AI teams across your organization.

insightCopilots.title: Personal Assistant Team
insightCopilots.description: Luna handles day-to-day tasks: email management, calendar coordination, WhatsApp communication, note-taking, and proactive follow-ups. Your AI executive assistant.

composableSkills.title: Data & Analytics Team
composableSkills.description: Data analyst, report generator, and knowledge manager agents. SQL queries, dataset analysis, automated reports, and knowledge graph management.

closedLoopActuators.title: Dev & Operations Team
closedLoopActuators.description: Self-modifying dev team with architect, coder, tester, and DevOps agents. They can create tools, fix bugs, run tests, and deploy — autonomously.

marketplaceConnectors.title: SRE & Infrastructure Agents
marketplaceConnectors.description: Alert triage, pattern detection, cloud architecture design, and infrastructure troubleshooting. Slack integration for ops channel monitoring.

adaptiveGovernanceAi.title: Advanced Memory & Recall
adaptiveGovernanceAi.description: Proactive memory suggestions, cross-session context threading, and memory-driven automations. Your agents anticipate what you need.

autonomousFinopsSuites.title: Marketplace & Plugins
autonomousFinopsSuites.description: Community-built agent skills, tool integrations, and workflow templates. Extend your agent capabilities without writing code.

testimonials.heading: Built for Builders
testimonials.subtitle: How teams are using ServiceTsunami to deploy production AI agents

items.quote: We went from a single chatbot to a full agent fleet in two weeks. Luna handles our client communications while the data team agents generate reports automatically. The memory system means nothing falls through the cracks.
items.author: AI Engineering Lead

items.quote: The self-modifying dev team is unlike anything I've seen. Our agents literally create their own tools when they need new capabilities. Combined with the knowledge graph, it's like having an AI team that gets smarter every day.
items.author: CTO

cta.heading: Ready to Deploy Your AI Agent Team?
cta.description: Start building multi-agent systems today. Create your account and have Luna, your AI co-pilot, up and running in minutes.
